title: Creston's UK City Essentials
description: Build a Minecraft City that looks just like the UK.
body:
![Creston's Metway](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bTumoPv8/images/46ca2dbf017c12d99191f5e459748e5162a84f3f.png)
# Welcome to Creston's UK City Essentials
Ever wanted to create an amazing looking Minecraft City based in the UK... well we have. We've put together a Minecraft Modpack for those who want to create a Minecraft City in Creative or Survival.

## With mods such as
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) (Trains, Big Gates & More)
- [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) (For easy Multiplayer worlds)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) & [Worldmap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) (To view your world easily)
- [Creston's UK City Pack](https://modrinth.com/mod/crestoncitymod) (Custom UK based items & blocks)
